exceptions.notes: Truck breakdown on I-10. Carrier dispatching replacement vehicle.
Pallet damage reported at destination dock. Claim filed.
Consignee address incomplete. Awaiting updated delivery instructions.
Weather delay — heavy snow on I-5 corridor through Oregon.
Bonded freight held for additional documentation. Broker working on release.
Late pickup — shipper facility closed early.
Water damage to 2 of 6 cartons. Partial claim in process.
Suite number missing. Driver attempted delivery, left notice.
Mechanical issue at transfer terminal. ETA pushed 24 hrs.
Shipment not scanned since departure. Carrier investigating. Escalated to management.
Traffic delay. Delivered 4 hours late, within SLA window.
Business closed at delivery. Rescheduled for next business day.
Minor cosmetic damage to outer packaging. Contents intact. No claim needed.
Carrier capacity issue. Shipment rescheduled to next available truck.
Gate code required. Obtained from consignee, delivered same day.
Missed connection at regional hub. Next dispatch tomorrow AM.
Import documentation mismatch. Awaiting corrected commercial invoice.
Driver hours-of-service limit reached. Resuming delivery in the morning.
Slight dent on one box. Consignee inspecting contents.
Flat tire en route. Repaired and delivered 2 hours late.
Last scan at Baltimore hub 4 days ago. Trace initiated.
Consignee name doesn't match receiving dock records. Verifying.
Construction detour added 3 hours. Delivered within tolerance.
